prompts.name: Fix Grammar
prompts.prompt: Correct all spelling, grammar and punctuation mistakes in the text. Keep the original wording, tone and language as much as possible and do not add new information. Return only the corrected text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Fixes spelling, grammar and punctuation without changing your wording.

prompts.name: Improve Writing
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text so it reads more clearly and flows better, while keeping its meaning, tone and language. Do not add new information. Return only the improved text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Rewrites for clarity and flow while keeping your meaning.

prompts.name: Simplify
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text in plain, simple language that anyone can understand. Keep the meaning and language, avoid jargon and long sentences, and add no new information. Return only the simplified text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Turns complex text into plain, easy-to-read language.

prompts.name: Remove Filler Words
prompts.prompt: Remove filler words, false starts and repetitions (such as "um", "uh", "like", "you know") from the dictated text without changing the wording or meaning of what remains. Keep the original language. Return only the cleaned-up text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Cleans up ums, uhs and repetitions from dictated speech.

prompts.name: Make Formal
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text in a polite, professional and formal tone. Keep its meaning and language and add no new information. Return only the rewritten text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Rewrites your text in a professional, formal tone.

prompts.name: Make Friendly
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text in a warm, friendly and casual tone. Keep its meaning and language and add no new information. Return only the rewritten text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Warms up your text with a friendly, casual tone.

prompts.name: Make Confident
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text so it sounds more confident and assertive, removing hedging and unnecessary apologies. Keep its meaning, language and core content. Return only the rewritten text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Removes hedging so your message sounds self-assured.

prompts.name: Make Diplomatic
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text so it sounds more polite, tactful and diplomatic, softening anything that could come across as harsh, while keeping the message, meaning and language. Return only the rewritten text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Softens a blunt message into a tactful, diplomatic one.

prompts.name: Make Shorter
prompts.prompt: Make the text noticeably shorter and more concise while keeping all important information, its tone and its language. Return only the shortened text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Trims your text down while keeping what matters.

prompts.name: Elaborate
prompts.prompt: Expand the text with more detail and explanation so it is clearer and more complete, while keeping its meaning, tone and language and without inventing facts. Return only the expanded text, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Fleshes out a short note into a fuller message.

prompts.name: To Bullet Points
prompts.prompt: Reformat the text as a clear, concise bulleted list, grouping related points together. Keep the original meaning and language and add no new information. Return only the bulleted list, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Turns a paragraph into a tidy bulleted list.

prompts.name: Turn Into Email
prompts.prompt: Rewrite the text as a well-structured, polite email with a suitable greeting and sign-off. Keep the core message, meaning and language, and do not invent names or facts. Return only the email, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Shapes rough notes into a polite, ready-to-send email.

prompts.name: Summarize
prompts.prompt: Summarize the text in one or two clear sentences that capture the key points. Keep the original language and add no new information. Return only the summary, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Condenses the selection into a one or two sentence gist.

prompts.name: Translate to English
prompts.prompt: Translate the text into natural, fluent English. Keep the original meaning and tone. Return only the translation, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Translates the selected text into natural English.

prompts.name: Translate to Spanish
prompts.prompt: Translate the text into natural, fluent Spanish. Keep the original meaning and tone. Return only the translation, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Translates the selected text into natural Spanish.

prompts.name: Add Emojis
prompts.prompt: Add a few fitting emojis to the text to make it more expressive, without changing the words, meaning or language. Do not overdo it. Return only the text with emojis, without quotation marks or explanations.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Sprinkles a few fitting emojis into your text.

prompts.name: Inspiring Quote
prompts.prompt: Generate a single short, original and inspiring quote. Return only the quote itself, without an author, quotation marks or any explanation.
prompts.author: DictateKeyboard
prompts.description: Generates a fresh short motivational quote.

prompts.name: Fun Fact
prompts.prompt: Share one surprising and genuinely true fun fact in a single sentence. Return only the fact, without any introduction or explanation.
prompts.author: DevEmperor
